item.title: How killer T cells attack tumors in 3D could sharpen future cancer immunotherapy
item.description: Cytotoxic T lymphocytes are the body's specialized "killer" cells, precisely eliminating infected or cancerous cells. Their action relies on a special...

item.title: Not all organs age alike: AI unveils the molecular impact of menopause across the female body
